# INSTRUCTION - Frontend Development Overview Instructions

## Instructions & Constraints

- DO NOT manually edit or create API proxy classes in `src/shared/proxies/`.
- MUST use the SKILL [Generate TypeScript Client for Angular](../skills/utilities/SKILL.md).
- ALWAYS following existing project structure, coding styles, existing libraries, stylesheets, and best practices.
